CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
SELECT monthname(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT monthname(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > DATE '1990-01-01';
SELECT monthname(event_date), COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY monthname(event_date);
SELECT t1.id, t1.event_date, (SELECT monthname(t1.event_date)) AS month_name FROM test_dates t1 WHERE t1.id = 2;
SELECT t1.id, t2.month_name FROM test_dates t1 JOIN (SELECT id, monthname(event_date) AS month_name FROM test_dates) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.event_date < DATE '2020-01-01';
WITH month_data AS (SELECT id, monthname(event_date) AS month_name FROM test_dates) SELECT month_name, COUNT(*) FROM month_data GROUP BY month_name ORDER BY month_name;
SELECT monthname(DATE '2023-02-28') AS month_name UNION SELECT monthname(DATE '2023-02-29');
SELECT (SELECT monthname(DATE '2022-02-28')) AS month_name, (SELECT monthname(DATE '2022-03-01')) AS next_month_name;
CREATE TABLE additional_dates (id INT, test_date DATE);
INSERT INTO additional_dates VALUES (1, DATE '1985-05-05'), (2, DATE '1971-01-15');
SELECT ad.id, ad.test_date, md.month_name FROM additional_dates ad JOIN (SELECT id, monthname(event_date) AS month_name FROM test_dates) md ON ad.id = md.id;
